title: Session 04 — Dangerous Experiments
bodyText:
**TL;DR: Judy left through the meat wall to hunt the source in the Underdark; her basement experiments advanced to an unknown stage 4 — the infected dead rise — and burst in on the house-sitting party.**

# What happened
- Judy agreed to help: the source is in the **Underdark**, and she might brew a temporary fix.
- She left alone through her **meat wall**, leaving the party house-sitting.
- They sampled [[pc-brolin|Brolin]]'s concoctions and slept; [[pc-varen|Varen]] snooped and heard the basement doors breaking.
- The experiments had advanced to an unknown **stage 4: the infected dead rise**. The party took positions as the door burst open.

# Fired / left smoking
- The stage-4 dead burst through the basement door — fight underway (cliffhanger).
- Judy is out alone hunting the source.

# Threads
[[pc-brolin]] · [[pc-varen]]
